conbody.p: This section describes issues and limitations present in Juniper Cloud-Native Router (JCNR) release 25.1.

section.title: Known Issues and Limitations in Juniper Cloud-Native Router Release 25.1

li.p: JCNR-11320: Modifying Layer 2 Circuit Protect Interface results in a cRPD crash—When configuring Layer 2 circuit configuration, if the protect interface is modified to another primary interface, it results in a cRPD crash. As a workaround you can delete the existing protect interface configuration and commit before adding the new protect interface configuration.

JCNR-11257: Traffic drop upon cRPD restart if JCNR is handling over 2 million flows through MPLSoUDP tunnels—When handling over two million traffic flows through MPLSoUDP tunnels, traffic drop may be observed in JCNR if cRPD is restarted. As a workaround you must restart the corresponding vRouter agent as well.
